_comment: Vigil private CA configuration — copy to vigil.config.json and edit
_comment_ca_keys: CA key material must be generated offline via ceremony/ scripts before Vigil can start

issuancePolicy._comment_allowedDnsSuffixes: Restrict issuance to your own domain(s). Empty list allows any DNS name — do not leave empty in production.
issuancePolicy._comment_allowedIdentityUriPrefixes: Restrict URI SANs to your environment prefix

_comment_allowNoneValidation: Never enable in production — auto-approves challenges without verification
